HOME.DESCRIPTION: The only self-improving, multi-agent orchestration framework for Java. 7 process types, YAML DSL, built-in governance, budget tracking, and 26 tools. Powered by Spring AI & Spring Boot.
HOME.INSTALL_TITLE: Add to Your Project in 30 Seconds
HOME.INSTALL_SUBTITLE: Available on Maven Central. Import the BOM and let it manage versions for all SwarmAI modules.
HOME.INSTALL_NOTE: Enterprise + Studio modules are licensed under BSL 1.1 and distributed via GitHub Packages.
HOME.INSTALL_VIEW_ALL: View all modules on Maven Central
HOME.PROCESS_SUBTITLE: From simple sequential pipelines to self-improving swarms with dynamic skill generation
HOME.PROCESS_SEQUENTIAL_DESC: Tasks run in dependency order, each receiving prior outputs as context.
HOME.PROCESS_PARALLEL_DESC: Independent tasks run concurrently in layers with automatic synchronization.
HOME.PROCESS_HIERARCHICAL_DESC: Manager agent creates plans, delegates to workers, and synthesizes results.
HOME.PROCESS_ITERATIVE_DESC: Execute, review, refine loop until the reviewer approves or max iterations reached.
HOME.PROCESS_SELF_IMPROVING_DESC: Generates new skills at runtime when capability gaps are detected. RL-powered decisions.
HOME.PROCESS_SWARM_DESC: Distributed fan-out with parallel self-improving agents per target.
HOME.PROCESS_COMPOSITE_DESC: Chain any processes into a pipeline: Parallel → Hierarchical → Iterative.
HOME.ENTERPRISE_SUBTITLE: Production-grade features that differentiate SwarmAI from personal AI assistants
HOME.ENTERPRISE_GOVERNANCE_DESC: Human-in-the-loop approval checkpoints pause workflows for review before sensitive operations.
HOME.ENTERPRISE_BUDGET_DESC: Real-time token and cost tracking with HARD_STOP or WARN enforcement per workflow.
HOME.ENTERPRISE_MULTI_TENANCY_DESC: Tenant-isolated memory, knowledge, quotas, and budgets for enterprise deployments.
HOME.ENTERPRISE_RBAC_DESC: Role-based access control with tool permission levels: READ_ONLY, WORKSPACE_WRITE, DANGEROUS.
HOME.ENTERPRISE_OBSERVABILITY_DESC: Correlation IDs, structured logging, decision tracing, Prometheus metrics, and health checks.
HOME.ENTERPRISE_CIRCUIT_BREAKER_DESC: resilience4j circuit breaker and retry on all LLM calls. Graceful degradation under failure.
HOME.CODE_TITLE: Define Workflows in YAML or Java
HOME.CODE_SUBTITLE: Zero-code YAML DSL or type-safe Java builders — your choice
HOME.CTA_SUBTITLE: Open source core • Enterprise features with Enterprise license • Spring Boot native

FAQ.TITLE: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.Q1: How do I get started with IntelliSwarm.ai open-source libraries?
FAQ.A1: Getting started is easy! All our libraries are available on GitHub under the IntelliSwarm.ai organization. You can clone the repositories, follow the documentation, and start implementing immediately. For enterprise support, we offer professional services including custom implementation guidance, training workshops, and dedicated support engineers to help you deploy and scale our solutions.
FAQ.Q2: What kind of enterprise support do you provide?
FAQ.A2: Our enterprise support includes priority response times (4-8 hours), custom implementation guidance, performance optimization, integration support, and dedicated support engineers. We also offer on-site training, workshops, quarterly business reviews, and custom feature development. For large enterprises, we provide 24/7 emergency support and compliance reviews.
FAQ.Q3: Can you help with custom development and integration?
FAQ.A3: Absolutely! We specialize in custom development and integration services. Our team can help you adapt our open-source libraries to your specific business requirements, integrate them with existing systems, and develop custom features. We work closely with your development team to ensure seamless implementation and provide ongoing support for custom solutions.
FAQ.Q4: What is the typical timeline for enterprise implementation?
FAQ.A4: Implementation timelines vary based on complexity and scope. Simple integrations can be completed in 2-4 weeks, while comprehensive enterprise deployments typically take 8-16 weeks. We provide detailed project timelines during the initial consultation and maintain regular check-ins throughout the process. Our agile approach ensures you see value early and can iterate based on feedback.
FAQ.Q5: Do you provide training and workshops for our team?
FAQ.A5: Yes! We offer comprehensive training programs including workshops, hands-on sessions, and ongoing education. Our training covers library usage, best practices, performance optimization, and troubleshooting. We can conduct sessions on-site at your location or virtually, and we provide training materials and documentation to help your team become self-sufficient with our solutions.
FAQ.Q6: How do you handle security and compliance requirements?
FAQ.A6: Security and compliance are top priorities. We conduct thorough security reviews of all implementations, provide compliance documentation, and ensure our solutions meet industry standards. For enterprise clients, we offer security audits, penetration testing, and compliance reviews. Our team stays current with the latest security best practices and can help you meet specific regulatory requirements.
FAQ.Q7: What happens after the initial implementation?
FAQ.A7: Our relationship continues long after implementation! We provide ongoing support, performance monitoring, and regular updates. We offer monthly check-ins, quarterly business reviews, and are always available for questions and optimization. As your needs evolve, we can help scale solutions, add new features, and ensure your IntelliSwarm.ai implementations continue to deliver value.

CONTRIBUTE.DESCRIPTION: Your SwarmAI deployment discovered framework improvements through the 10% self-improvement investment. Submit them here to benefit all SwarmAI users worldwide.
CONTRIBUTE.STEP1_NOTE: This produces an anonymized JSON file with no workflow content or user data.
CONTRIBUTE.STEP2_DESC: Security team audits the export. It contains only structural patterns — convergence defaults, tool routing hints, anti-patterns, and skill metadata.
CONTRIBUTE.STEP3_DESC: Upload or paste the JSON below. Improvements are validated, aggregated, and flow into the next SwarmAI release via automated PRs.
CONTRIBUTE.OPTIONAL_DESC: Help us understand where these improvements come from. All fields are optional except the agreement.
CONTRIBUTE.NOTES_PLACEHOLDER: Any context about your deployment (scale, workflow types, etc.)
CONTRIBUTE.AGREE: I confirm this export contains only anonymized framework improvement data and no proprietary information.
CONTRIBUTE.ALT_GITHUB_DESC: Attach the export file to a new issue using the "improvement-contribution" template.
CONTRIBUTE.ALT_EMAIL_DESC: Send the export file directly. Security-reviewed exports welcome.
CONTRIBUTE.PRIVACY_DESC: SwarmAI improvement exports contain only anonymized structural patterns — convergence defaults, tool routing hints, anti-patterns, and skill metadata. No workflow content, no user data, no proprietary information. The export file is human-readable JSON designed for security team review before submission.
